name: Christmas Market Shop Simulator
short_description: Get into the festive spirit with Christmas Market Shop Simulator! Manage your shop in a Christmas market, sell holiday treats, decorations, toys, and gifts. Decorate your store, scan items, and grow your business to become the best in the market by the end of the season.
detailed_description:
Christmas Market Shop Simulator is a festive, single-player simulation game where you run a shop in a bustling Christmas market. Level up your shop by unlocking new products, from Christmas treats and drinks to toys, decorations, and gifts.

Decorate your store, arrange products on shelves, and manage your cash register while keeping track of profits. You’ll need to handle inventory, stock up, and ensure your customers have everything they need to make their holiday special. Your goal is to make your shop the most successful by the end of the Christmas season. Complete achievements, grow your business, and bring the holiday cheer to life!
